transitions.trigger: Voice utterance, mesh message, brief item, SMS in, manual
transitions.notes: Pseudo-state entry. _new is not a real directory; this transition is task creation.

transitions.trigger: Task agent picks it up for investigation

transitions.notes: VOICE-AGENT-ONLY. Mesh-side schedulers and task-agent must REFUSE this transition. Distinct from generic intake→shop-floor because voice agent IS the executor during the upload (spec §1 Rule 4).

transitions.trigger: Blocker raised; both blocker.json and blockers.md must be present
schedule.json written; brief reader may auto-schedule from patterns.json
schedule.json.scheduled_at falls within current UTC day; brief reader sweeps
Blocker resolved AND parked_until in the past; cron promotes
transitions.notes: schedule.json may need re-write if scheduled_at is now stale; cron should re-stamp.

transitions.trigger: Upload reports status=done; voice agent finalizes
Upload reports status=failed; voice agent files blocker

illegal_transition_examples_for_test_cov.reason: must visit shop-floor first to surface blockers
no work performed; would be a meta-failure (test gap, false postmortem)
must transit today/ for brief-reader visibility (audit trail)
must re-enter today/ via check-and-promote-cron and then run execution path
blocker-resolution goes parked→today, not parked→planned (plan already exists)
done is terminal; rework requires a new task with linked_to
in-flight is voice-agent-owned; cannot demote to task-agent investigation
uploads do not enter the scheduler

illegal_transition_examples_for_test_cov.reason_when_invalid: writer_role != voice-agent — only voice agent can promote intake to in-flight
